scripts.tools:install:rust: if test -x .cargo-tools/bin/protoc-gen-buffa && test -x .cargo-tools/bin/protoc-gen-buffa-packaging && test -x .cargo-tools/bin/protoc-gen-connect-rust; then exit 0; fi; CARGO_HOME=$(pwd)/.cache/cargo cargo install --locked --root .cargo-tools protoc-gen-buffa --version 0.3.0 && CARGO_HOME=$(pwd)/.cache/cargo cargo install --locked --root .cargo-tools protoc-gen-buffa-packaging --version 0.3.0 && CARGO_HOME=$(pwd)/.cache/cargo cargo install --locked --root .cargo-tools connectrpc-codegen --version 0.3.2
